message:
test(presenter): add 60 edge-case tests for ANSI presenter, cost model, SGR delta (bd-27tya)

Cover cost model digit boundaries (CUP/CHA/CUF at u16::MAX), DP gap threshold
(32/33 cells), SmallVec spill (>4 spans), scratch reuse, CellStyle traits, SGR
length estimation accuracy, style delta hot paths (color-only changes), full
reset fallback, bold/dim collateral re-enable, TRANSPARENT transitions,
continuation cell variants, sync output ordering, multi-frame state invariants,
clear_line, presenter stats, and capabilities accessor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
